productDisplayName: Espirit Men Grey Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Style NoteTaking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality.Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel round caseDial style: Charcoal grey dial with silver handsStrap style: Steel strap with a butterfly claspFeatures: 3-faced chronograph display, branding at the 12 hour mark Screw to reset timeWater resistance up to 100 meters,  wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.SizeCase diameter: 43mmCase thickness: 8mmWarranty: 2 years
